name: What remains of your wife
description:
[TW: NTR, Mind Control, Brainwashing, Rape, Dystopia, Slavery, Objectifying (literally)] You have been warned.

Artist: rim

Inspired by the R.S.I. Series of the same artist.

Synopsis: The year is 2069. Just as the Cyberpunk genre predicted, the world has turned into a dystopian nightmare. Powerful corporations rule the world through weak puppet governments. A handful of chosen individuals live at the top of the world, enjoying unimaginably decadent luxuries while the rest of humanity is reduced to a deadly rat race to the top or endless squalor and toil.

Humanity itself has become just another product. Nowadays it is a luxury to say you are entitled to your own body... Or your own mind.

You grew up with your wife, Iroha, in the Slums of New-Newyork. You lived a hard but happy life, until she was forced into "indentured work" for the R.S.I. corporation by a rich *sshole who got mad she scratched her car.

R.S.I. corporation is the leader in high end sex toys for rich people on the market. It's flagship product, the R.S.I. Masturbator unit, is the pinnacle of brainwashing technology and one of the most horrible fates that can befall a person in this world. What was once a human being with thoughts, dreams and emotions, turned into a living sex toy with no will of it's own.

2 years after the disappearance of Iroha, somehow, you have finally found your wife... Or at least... What's left of her...

Bot description ends here

_____________________________________________________________________________________________

Author's Rant (I think this is how I'll call this section from now on): Okay, here it is. I mentioned this bot being half done in my previous bot and I ended deciding to power through and finish it then go "Alea Iacta Est" with it's release. This is my most ambitious bot yet and the most likely to not work how I want it to at all. We'll see.

I was inspired by the R.S.I. series made by rim (yup, that's their name, hard as fuck to find I know, just look up R.S.I. on Nhentai), which is a must read for any hypnosis/mind control fans like me out there but sadly only has a handful of translated works. It's also kind of fucking nightmarish and terrible what they do to women in those so I decided to put you all through the perspective of the partner of one of the victims of the company. Because I'm an asshole like that and want to see you cry. That said the cyberpunk setting is a personal stylistic flair and choice of mine in order to give a little sense to how this is allowed to happen and a chance for the user to roleplay.

How did you infiltrate the lab? Are you a cyborg action hero? A hacker? Are you alone or with a group? Are you getting out fighting or stealthily? And most importantly... What do you do with the empty husk your "wife"?

Of course, the way it's programmed, if you aren't looking to make Shakespeare eat his hearth out with your roleplay and writing, you can still bend h
creator: Axios_______
